posts.raw_content:
The only way your vote can matter is if you are willing to use it as a weapon. Everyone is trapped in the narrative that if we vote against our FAKE PATRIOT REPUBLICANS, the dems will take over and ruin everything. Guess what, the country was ALREADY ruined by both sides. The only way we can get real patriots in there is to bite the bullet and vote out every incumbent. 

Don't tell me about your guns and ammo and what a badass you'll be when the shit hits the fan until you're willing to weaponize your vote first.

Make voting out the incumbents a big enough movement and we will either see them start voting the right way, or we will accelerate the end of this shit system. Either one is better than what we're doing now.
